session.user:
Perform a mechanical rename across test files. Replace ALL occurrences of the old string with the new string in each file listed below. Do NOT change any logic, just string replacements.
## Replacements to make:
1. In ALL files: `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context` (this covers branch names like `async-learn/42`, `async-learn/100`, `async-learn/200`, `async-learn/700` etc.) 2. In `tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py` ONLY: - `_fetch_xmls_from_async_learn_branch` → `_fetch_xmls_from_context_branch` (function name in import and all uses) - `test_fetches_from_async_learn_branch_when_local_not_found` → `test_fetches_from_context_branch_when_local_not_found` (test function name) - `test_skips_when_async_learn_branch_not_found` → `test_skips_when_context_branch_not_found` (test function name)
## Files to update:
1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_fetch_sessions.py` 3. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py` 4. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_learn_sessions.py` 5. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py`
For each file: 1. Read the file 2. Use Edit with `replace_all=true` for `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context` 3. For test_land_learn.py, also do separate edits for the function name and test function name renames
IMPORTANT: Use `replace_all=true` parameter on the Edit tool for the `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context` replacement in each file. For function renames, also use `replace_all=true`.

Excellent! All the renames have been successfully applied. Let me create a summary of what was changed:
## Summary
Successfully performed mechanical rename across all 5 test files:
### Global Replacements (all files): - `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context` - This covers all branch name references like `async-learn/42`, `async-learn/100`, `async-learn/200`, `async-learn/700`, etc.
### Files Updated:
1. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_push_session.py`** - 11 occurrences of `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context`
2. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_fetch_sessions.py`** - 8 occurrences of `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context`
3. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_download_remote_session.py`** - 3 occurrences of `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context`
4. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_get_learn_sessions.py`** - 7 occurrences of `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context`
5. **`/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_land_learn.py`** - 19 occurrences of `async-learn` → `planned-pr-context` - Function name: `_fetch_xmls_from_async_learn_branch` → `_fetch_xmls_from_context_branch` (6 occurrences) - Test function: `test_fetches_from_async_learn_branch_when_local_not_found` → `test_fetches_from_context_branch_when_local_not_found` - Test function: `test_skips_when_async_learn_branch_not_found` → `test_skips_when_context_branch_not_found`
All replacements were performed using `replace_all=true` to ensure complete coverage. No logic was changed, only string replacements as requested.
